notableEvents.label: José Ramírez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: José Ramírez reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Maikel Garcia. Chase DeLauter to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Brayan Rocchio GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brayan Rocchio grounds into a double play, second baseman Nick Loftin to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Daniel Schneemann out at 2nd. Brayan Rocchio out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Austin Hedges steals (1) 3rd base. Petey Halpin steals (1) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Kyle Manzardo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Manzardo flies out to right fielder Lane Thomas. José Ramírez to 3rd.
